name: Doughnuts and Coffee Cake from Risen Bread Do
recipeIngredient: When making a batch of bread, it is a simple matter to remove 2 cups of the dough after the first rising, and work other ingredients into it to make doughnuts or coffee cake.
For doughnuts, work into 2 cups once-risen bread dough:
approximately 2 cups flour (or enough to make a dough that is soft, but workable)
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the dough out and cut with a floured doughnut cutter.
2. Let the doughnuts rise until light.
3. Deep-fry them.
4. Coffee Cake Using Risen Bread Dough:
- Into 2 cups of once-risen dough, work 3/4 cup sugar, 1/3 cup soft butter. No extra flour will be needed.
- Roll the dough to fit a 10-inch square pan.
- Brush the top with butter and cover with a Streusel or simply with sugar and cinnamon.
- Let it rise and bake in a 350°F oven for about 30 to 45 minutes.
5. One delicious variation is made by spreading the top of the dough with apricot preserves and topping the preserves with a meringue. Bake as directed.
